_comment: PPE (Pay-Per-Event) config for Apify Standby Actors.
- Every Apify user gets $5/month in free platform credits.
- At $0.02/call that's 250 free runs per user per month.
- First paid dollar only flows after a user's free credits are exhausted.
- Solo devs and hobbyists may never pay — price for pro/team users.
- Keep the ratio 4:1 so discovery is cheap and execution is billable.
- startedAt MUST be >= 14 days from the push date.
- Set it 15-20 days out to be safe.

light-read.eventDescription: Charged for catalog, list, or lookup tool calls. Low compute.

heavy-call.eventDescription: Charged per primary tool call. Returns analysis results.
